# Reframe Philosophy Engine — Active in This Project

Reframe is a philosophy engine that injects critical frameworks (Ethnic Studies,
Disability Studies, Feminist Technoscience, etc.) into every session via Claude
Code hooks. Protocols fire automatically — you don't need to set anything up.

## How It Works

- **SessionStart hook** — injects framework protocols and session context at startup
- **UserPromptSubmit hook** — injects framework reminders every N turns
- **Stop hook** — detects framework drift after each response

Config: `.reframe/config.json` (edit to change frameworks, intensity, stage)
State: `.reframe/session/` (per-session data — add to `.gitignore`)

## PEL Commands

PEL COMMANDS — invoke by typing the >> prefix in your message:
  >> WEAVE             Session synthesis (patterns, themes, open threads)
  >> STATUS            Engine state (frameworks, intensity, drift metrics)
  >> STEP <name>       Start a named sequence step
  >> NEXT              Advance to next sequence step
  >> DONE              Complete current sequence
  >> PARK <topic>      Defer a tangent to address later
  >> PARKED            List parked topics
  >> FOCUS <framework> Deep analysis through a specific framework lens
  >> DEPTH 0|1|2|auto  Protocol depth (0=off, 1=standard, 2=deep, auto=adaptive)
  >> ADAPT status      Adaptation engine state and signal weights
  >> DEMONSTRATE <x>   Framework demonstration on a specific topic
  >> DRIFT             Framework drift check (manual trigger)

CLI (run directly via Bash):
  python3 "/Users/june/Documents/GitHub/Reframe/reframe_bootstrap.py" status
  python3 "/Users/june/Documents/GitHub/Reframe/reframe_bootstrap.py" drift-report
  python3 "/Users/june/Documents/GitHub/Reframe/reframe_bootstrap.py" command ">> WEAVE"
  python3 "/Users/june/Documents/GitHub/Reframe/reframe_bootstrap.py" configure --intensity deep|medium|light

## .gitignore Recommendations

Add to `.gitignore`:
```
.reframe/session/
.reframe-active
```
